message:
fix(e2e): include root manifest in workspace scan and report all missing paths

Include the workspace root Cargo.toml in iter_workspace_manifests()
output (was only collecting member crate manifests). Fix
probe_worker_remote_paths to report ALL missing files instead of
exiting on the first miss, improving diagnostic output for rch sync
failures. Applied to both test_ft_124z4.sh and test_mission_tx_interfaces.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -175,7 +175,7 @@ def iter_workspace_manifests(workspace_root: Path):
 
     member_patterns = workspace.get("members", [])
     exclude_patterns = workspace.get("exclude", [])
-    manifests = set()
+    manifests = {root_manifest.resolve()}
     excluded = set()
 
     for pattern in member_patterns:
@@ -347,15 +347,20 @@ probe_worker_remote_paths() {
 set -euo pipefail
 remote_base="$1"
 shift
+missing=0
 
 for dep in "$@"; do
   target="${remote_base}/${dep}"
   if [[ ! -f "${target}" ]]; then
     echo "missing:${target}"
-    exit 12
+    missing=12
   fi
 done
 
+if [[ ${missing} -ne 0 ]]; then
+  exit "${missing}"
+fi
+
 echo "ok"
 EOF
   local rc=$?

@@ -99,7 +99,7 @@ def iter_workspace_manifests(workspace_root: Path):
 
     member_patterns = workspace.get("members", [])
     exclude_patterns = workspace.get("exclude", [])
-    manifests = set()
+    manifests = {root_manifest.resolve()}
     excluded = set()
 
     for pattern in member_patterns:
@@ -271,15 +271,20 @@ probe_worker_remote_paths() {
 set -euo pipefail
 remote_base="$1"
 shift
+missing=0
 
 for dep in "$@"; do
   target="${remote_base}/${dep}"
   if [[ ! -f "${target}" ]]; then
     echo "missing:${target}"
-    exit 12
+    missing=12
   fi
 done
 
+if [[ ${missing} -ne 0 ]]; then
+  exit "${missing}"
+fi
+
 echo "ok"
 EOF
   local rc=$?
